pi_items.source: Confirmed in task description and export_result.sh line 10: OUTPUT_FILE=/home/ga/Documents/CloudBridge_SRS_v3.0.docx
Task description explicitly states this replacement; setup_task.sh line 31 creates document with 'DataSync Pro' product name
Task description and setup_task.sh line 69: 'DS Pro: Abbreviation for DataSync Pro'; line 77: 'DS Pro is a standalone product'
Task description states 'DataSync (standalone) -> CloudBridge Enterprise'; appears throughout setup_task.sh (lines 54, 61, 62, 77, 83, 99, 100, 106)
Task description and setup_task.sh; 'Nextera Solutions' appears at lines 45, 63, 89, 105, 113
Task description: 'Update Version: 2.3 to Version: 3.0'; setup_task.sh line 37 creates title page with 'Version: 2.3'
Task description and setup_task.sh line 40: 'June 15, 2024' on title page

Discrepancy identified: metadata lists 'Nextera' but actual term in document is 'Nextera Solutions' (never appears as 'Nextera' alone in setup_task.sh). Verifier.py line 121 checks for 'Nextera Solutions' specifically, not 'Nextera'.
Task description explicitly states these are the new terms to replace the old ones
setup_task.sh line 74: doc.add_paragraph('2. Overall Description', style='Heading 1')
setup_task.sh line 94: doc.add_paragraph('3. Specific Requirements', style='Heading 1')

privileged_info_summary: The task involves rebranding a Software Requirements Specification document from 'DataSync Pro' product developed by 'Nextera Solutions' to 'CloudBridge Enterprise' developed by 'CloudBridge Inc.' The source document at /home/ga/Documents/DataSync_SRS_v2.3.docx is generated synthetically with python-docx and contains: title page with version 2.3 and date June 15, 2024; three main sections (Introduction, Overall Description, Specific Requirements); and appendix. The agent must replace four product/company terms and update version number to 3.0 and date to January 15, 2025, then save to /home/ga/Documents/CloudBridge_SRS_v3.0.docx. One minor discrepancy exists: metadata forbids 'Nextera' but the document contains 'Nextera Solutions' (the verifier checks for 'Nextera Solutions' specifically).
